title: Denial In Women No Disheartening To Men.
content:
Women, although they ne'er so goodly make it,
    Their fashion is, but to say no, to take it.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Denial In Women No Disheartening To Men.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
